name: Castle Guardian
short_description: Legendary action with tower defense warfare! Become a castle guard in fantastic medieval era! Destroy the enemies with your wingman Centaur. Defend your castle!
detailed_description:
Castle Guardian


is a tower defense game set in a fantastical medieval world. Only you can protect your castle from armies consisting of skeleton soldiers and monsters. Strengthen your character and your companion, the Centaur, to wage war and repel the armies!

Tower Defense Warfare


Experience a unique Tower Defense Warfare. Defend your castle from Skeleton and Monster armies using traps, special abilities, and weapons!

Companion Centaur


You've been tasked with protecting your castle. Fight alongside your companion, the Centaur, to repel enemy armies while defending your castle.

Legendary Boss Battles


Use your strategy to defeat powerful bosses.

Enemy Armies


Battle against stronger enemy armies as wave levels increase. Fight against enemy armies in levels with up to 10 wave levels!

Special Abilities


Use your special abilities to teleport and attack enemies from the air, stop them, deliver powerful spear strikes, and annihilate them.

Different Castle Sieges


Defend your castle from enemy armies on different maps.

Market Section


Each map has its own Market section. Purchase items from the Market section as you have enough money, level up the Centaur, repair your castle, set traps, and empower yourself.

Chest Opening Section


Use Magical Mushrooms to open chests from the Menu section and earn Gold and Costumes. Find Magical Mushrooms on the map based on your luck or purchase them for 50 Gold from the Menu.

supported_languages:
English*, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
